stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct in regards to the reception of a radio signal?

options.a: Reception will deteriorate with a cold air mass moving over a warm sea, because the outside air temperature decreases.
options.b: Reception will deteriorate with a cold air mass moving over a warm sea, because of refraction.
options.c: Reception will improve with a cold air mass moving over a warm sea, because of refraction.
options.d: Air masses have no effect on attenuation and the signal strength remains unchanged.
